attractions.name: Dam Square
attractions.description: This lively central square is where Amsterdam truly comes alive- surrounded by historic buildings, street performers, and a constant buzz of energy
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Van Gogh Museum
attractions.description: Museum dedicated to the life and works of Van Gogh

attractions.name: Heineken Experience
attractions.description: An immersive, interactive walk through the story of one of the world's most famous beer brands
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Kalverstraat
attractions.description: One of Amsterdam's most popular shopping streets, lined with global brands, boutiques, and cafés
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: De 9 Straatjes (Nine Streets)
attractions.description: A charming network of narrow streets filled with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and cozy cafés
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Amsterdam Canal Cruise
attractions.description: Glide through the UNESCO-listed canals as illuminated bridges reflect across the water and narrow canal houses line the banks
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Jordaan District
attractions.description: Charming neighbourhood with narrow canals, boutique stores, art galleries, and hidden courtyards
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Amsterdam Canal Belt (Grachtengordel)
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Amsterdam: 75-Minute Luxury Canal Cruise
attractions.description: Guided cruise through UNESCO-listed canals with local skipper sharing stories
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Rijksmuseum
attractions.description: Netherlands' grandest museum featuring masterpieces by Rembrandt and Vermeer
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: STRAAT Museum
attractions.description: Street art and graffiti museum in a massive industrial warehouse
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Vondelpark
attractions.description: Amsterdam's most loved green space with tree-lined paths
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.description: Lively market in De Pijp neighbourhood
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Poffertjes (Mini Dutch Pancakes)
local_dishes.description: Small, fluffy pancakes served with butter and powdered sugar — light, slightly crispy outside and soft inside
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Stroopwafels (Caramel Waffles)
local_dishes.description: Two thin waffle layers with warm caramel syrup in between — best enjoyed fresh and slightly gooey
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Avocado Toast & Brunch Plates
local_dishes.description: Amsterdam does brunch exceptionally well — fresh, vibrant, and beautifully plated
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Falafel & Middle Eastern Bowls
local_dishes.description: A staple vegetarian option in Amsterdam — flavourful, filling, and widely available
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Dutch Coffee Culture
local_dishes.description: Smooth, strong coffee served in cozy cafés — perfect for canal-side breaks
source_files: Netherlands/Anurag_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Dutch Cheese (Gouda & Edam)
local_dishes.description: Creamy, rich cheeses ranging from mild to aged, often sampled at local cheese shops
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Poffertjes
local_dishes.description: Mini fluffy pancakes served with powdered sugar and butter; light, airy, and addictive
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Dutch Fries (Patat)
local_dishes.description: Thick-cut fries served in cones with sauces like mayo, satay, or curry ketchup
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Broodje Kaas
local_dishes.description: Simple yet delicious Dutch cheese sandwich, often with fresh bread and mustard
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Appeltaart
local_dishes.description: Dense, cinnamon-spiced apple pie with a buttery crust, often served with whipped cream
source_files: Netherlands/Sirisha_Europe_All Inclusive Guide.docx

transport_options.description: NS trains connect Amsterdam to other Dutch cities and regions

Regional and local buses connect Amsterdam to nearby areas
Direct train from Schiphol Airport to Haarlem Station
